summary: Azure Blob Storage migration testing completed successfully. All 12 tests passed, confirming the migration from Emergent Object Storage to Azure Blob Storage is working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Azure storage service (azure_storage.py) correctly implements put_object, get_object, delete_object, generate_sas_url
SAS URLs correctly include all required parameters: sv (service version), sig (signature), se (expiry), sp (permissions), sr (resource)
File upload returns Azure URL format: https://profiremanagerdata.blob.core.windows.net/fichiers-clients/...
SAS URL expiry correctly set to 15 minutes as specified
Download endpoint correctly returns HTTP 302 redirect to Azure SAS URL
_refresh_sas_urls helper in prevention.py correctly regenerates SAS URLs for batiments photos
Prevention media upload (prevention_media.py) correctly uploads to Azure and returns SAS URL
seed_data_creation: Test files uploaded during testing (text, image, PDF) for verification purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Azure Blob Storage migration verified. Key endpoints: (1) POST /api/demo/files/upload - returns Azure SAS URL. (2) GET /api/demo/files/{file_id}/sas-url - returns valid SAS URL with 15-min expiry. (3) GET /api/demo/files/{file_id}/download?auth={token} - HTTP 302 redirect to Azure. (4) GET /api/demo/prevention/batiments - backward compatible with _refresh_sas_urls helper. Azure config: AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME=profiremanagerdata, AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_NAME=fichiers-clients.

SAS_URL_GENERATION.details: SAS URL includes sv, sig, se, sp, sr parameters; expires_in_minutes=15

DOWNLOAD_REDIRECT.description: GET /api/demo/files/{file_id}/download redirects to Azure SAS URL (HTTP 302)
DOWNLOAD_REDIRECT.details: Returns 302 with Location header pointing to Azure SAS URL

BATIMENT_DETAIL.details: Returns building with refreshed SAS URLs for photos

DIFFERENT_FILE_TYPES.description: Azure service handles text, image, and PDF files correctly
DIFFERENT_FILE_TYPES.details: Content types correctly preserved: text/plain, image/png, application/pdf

SAS_URL_ACCESSIBILITY.description: SAS URLs are directly accessible from Azure
SAS_URL_ACCESSIBILITY.details: Direct GET to Azure SAS URL returns 200 with file content

PREVENTION_PHOTO_UPLOAD.details: Base64 image uploaded to Azure, returns SAS URL
